main_strength: Combines no-true-center pilot learning with fast learned-center GPU search and audit.
main_risk: Pilot set is not representative of later samples.
runtime_cost: 18,000 rows took 278.826 s with 96.04% success, 137 fallback rows, and 0/900 audit mismatches.

task_type: Q3 close-frequency two-tone GPU fast kernel
main_strength: Extremely fast when the center prior is valid; 1,800 rows completed in 7.923 s in the recorded benchmark.
main_risk: Center prior is wrong, absent, or not transferable across samples.
runtime_cost: Very low for large repeated workloads once the center prior is known.

main_strength: Provides the no-true-center GPU oracle used by adaptive pilot, fallback, and audit.
main_risk: Very close, low-SNR cases can collapse to one-tone decisions or land on the frequency-error boundary.
runtime_cost: 1,800 rows took 310.638 s in the recorded benchmark; projected 18,000-row full-auto runtime was about 52 minutes before adaptive acceleration.
